current_limitation: Only a small number of years have canopy labels for direct supervision.
impact_on_results: Limits model capacity, especially for large transformers.
recommended_future_work: Add more labeled years or use pseudo-labeling / semi-supervised expansion.

current_limitation: Evaluation is limited to a held-out year within the same study domain.
impact_on_results: Does not prove transfer across regions or ecosystems.
recommended_future_work: Run cross-region and cross-domain validation experiments.

current_limitation: Consistency loss assumes smooth year-to-year evolution except for weighted change areas.
impact_on_results: Can suppress real abrupt canopy changes.
recommended_future_work: Use uncertainty-aware or change-detection-guided consistency losses.

current_limitation: NLCD canopy and land cover are passed as numeric channels.
recommended_future_work: Try one-hot or embedding-based categorical encodings.

current_limitation: Prithvi pretraining does not match the downstream canopy regression setup closely.
impact_on_results: Large pretrained models underperform despite higher capacity.
recommended_future_work: Test alternate adapters, multi-scale heads, or domain-specific fine-tuning strategies.

current_limitation: Hyperparameter exploration was meaningful but not exhaustive.
impact_on_results: Some performance gains may remain undiscovered.
recommended_future_work: Run a focused sweep on the U-Net family only.

current_limitation: Final claims depend heavily on 2023 as the held-out year.
impact_on_results: Robustness across years is not fully characterized.
recommended_future_work: Add cross-year validation and uncertainty analysis.
